sign_in.title: Login to your account
sign_in.description: Enter your email below to sign in to your account

sign_up.title: Create an account
sign_up.description: Enter your email below to create an account
sign_up.email_description: We will use this email to contact you and verify your account.
sign_up.join_via_invite: You're creating an account with an invite link.

rules.length: Must be at least {num} characters long.
rules.special: Must contain at least one special character and one number.

verify.label: Verify your email
verify.description: We've sent a verification code to {email}. Please enter it below to complete your account setup.

forgot_password.title: Reset password with recovery phrase
forgot_password.description: Enter the email for your account and your recovery phrase, then set a new login password.
forgot_password.done: Your password was updated. Sign in with your new password.
forgot_password.error: Could not reset password. Check your email and recovery phrase.
forgot_password.card_link: Forgot password? Reset using your recovery phrase
forgot_password.recovery: The recovery phrase is a 12-word sequence given when creating the account.

unlock.title: Unlock encryption
unlock.description: Enter your account password to decrypt your keys. On this browser, your key can then be restored after refresh (wrapped with a device key; not stored as plaintext).
unlock.password_description: Same password you use to sign in. It decrypts your stored key material client-side.
unlock.logout: Or logout and sign in with your password

security.title: Security & keys
security.change_password_description: Updates your login password and re-wraps your recovery phrase. Your encryption keys stay the same.
security.change_password_error: Could not change password. Try again.
security.rotate_password_hint: Must be your current login password — it is checked by decrypting your stored recovery phrase before rotation starts.
security.key_log_section_body: Review SHA-256 fingerprints of public keys stored on the server and export the history for verification.
security.recovery_body: Your data passphrase (recovery phrase) is never sent to the server. If you lose it and your account password, your documents cannot be recovered. Store a backup offline.
security.key_history_description: SHA-256 (hex) of each armored public key the server stored, in order. Export periodically and compare if you suspect key substitution.
security.rotate_description: Generates a new recovery phrase and OpenPGP keypair, re-encrypts every document, then updates the server in one atomic request.
security.rotate_wrong_password: That account password is incorrect. It must match your login password (the one that decrypts your stored recovery phrase).

user_profile.title: Profile
user_profile.description: Profile information are the only information stored on the server, without any encryption.
user_profile.language_description: Change the application language. Your choice is saved on your account for future messages from us (e.g. email).
user_profile.identity_description: Update how you appear in the app. Email verification is not required yet.
user_profile.email_note: Changing your email does not send a verification message yet.
user_profile.save_error: Could not save profile. Check your input or try again.
user_profile.delete_section_description: Permanently remove your account, sessions, and server-side profile data. This cannot be undone.
user_profile.delete_step1_description: You will lose access immediately. Organization data you created may remain for other members; your membership and personal server records are removed.
user_profile.delete_step2_description: This permanently deletes your account. You will be signed out.
user_profile.delete_error: Could not delete account. Try again or contact support.

security_logs.title: Security Activity Log
security_logs.description: A short history of encryption key updates and account password changes.

company.title: Set up your company
company.description: Choose a name for your workspace. You can change this later in settings.
company.error_create: Could not create workspace. Try again.

invite_landing.title: Organization invitation
invite_landing.invalid: This invitation link is invalid or has expired.
invite_landing.signed_out_hint: Create an account or sign in to accept this invitation.
invite_landing.accept_error: Could not accept the invitation. Try again.
invite_landing.has_organization: You already belong to an organization. You can still accept if this invite is for that same organization; otherwise you’ll need to leave your current organization first.

members.title: Members
members.subtitle: Change roles or remove people from this workspace.
members.confirm_remove: Remove this member from the workspace?
members.error_conflict: That change isn’t allowed (for example, the last admin).
members.grant_organization_access_error: Could not grant access. Try again.

organization_access_pending.title: Your account is waiting for an organization admin
organization_access_pending.description: An administrator must grant you access before you can open organization-shared documents and encryption. If you just joined, ask an admin to open Team → Members and use “Grant organization access” for your account.

invites.title: Invite people
invites.subtitle: Generate a link to share. It expires automatically; email delivery is not set up yet.
invites.admin_only: Only workspace admins can create invite links.
invites.card_description: Recipients use the link to sign up or sign in and join this workspace.
invites.error_expires: Enter a valid expiry of at least 60 seconds.
invites.error_create: Could not create invite. Try again.

organization_key.title: Organization encryption
organization_key.description: Generate a shared organization key so shared documents can be encrypted for all members. The server only stores opaque wrapped keys and ciphertext.
organization_key.unlock_first: Unlock your encryption (passphrase) to generate or use the organization key.
organization_key.sync_description: If someone joined after the key was created, or uploaded their public key later, you can sync so they receive a wrapped copy without changing the key for everyone else. New members are also updated automatically when an admin has unlocked encryption.

documents_list.title: Documents
documents_list.description: This is a list of all the documents in the database.

documents_details.tenant_key_missing: Organization encryption is not set up yet. If you are an admin, open Team and generate an organization key.
documents_details.tenant_key_missing_editor: You do not have a wrapped copy of the organization key yet. Ask an administrator to open Team → Organization encryption (after you have uploaded your public key). Keys are distributed automatically when an admin is signed in with encryption unlocked.
documents_details.tenant_key_error: Could not load organization encryption key.
documents_details.share_org_encrypt: Share with organization using organization encryption
documents_details.create_need_organization_key: Generate an organization key under Team before using organization encryption.
documents_details.create_need_organization_key_editor: You cannot use organization encryption until an administrator shares the organization key with your account. Ask them to open Team; keys are distributed automatically when an admin has encryption unlocked, or they can use “Sync key for members”.
